https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Large_lang.summary: Large language models (LLMs) are advanced computational systems designed for natural language processing, evolving from early statistical methods to modern transformer-based architectures. The field has seen significant milestones including the development of GPT-4, the rise of multimodal capabilities, and the emergence of high-performance open-weight models like DeepSeek R1. These models are trained on vast datasets to perform tasks such as text generation, translation, and reasoning.
